title: Lock accounts after five failed login attempts
body: After five consecutive failed login attempts the account is locked for fifteen minutes. The counter resets on a successful sign-in or after the lockout window elapses. Lockouts are per-account, not per-IP, so a distributed guess still trips the same threshold.

title: Webhook delivery retries on exponential backoff with jitter
body: Failed webhook deliveries are retried on an exponential backoff schedule with random jitter to avoid a thundering herd. The base delay is two seconds, doubling each attempt up to six attempts, after which the delivery is dead-lettered for manual replay.

title: Incident: Postgres connection pool exhaustion during checkout
body: During the flash sale the checkout path exhausted the Postgres connection pool because each request opened a fresh connection outside the pool. The fix routes all checkout queries through the shared pool and caps concurrent connections. Root cause was a bypass added for a debugging session that shipped by accident.

title: Adopt reciprocal rank fusion for hybrid search ranking
body: We adopt reciprocal rank fusion to combine the BM25 keyword list and the vector cosine list into one ranked result. RRF is parameter-light, robust to score-scale differences between the two backends, and avoids the tuning burden of a weighted linear blend. The fusion constant k is sixty.

title: Move session storage from signed cookies to Redis
body: User sessions are now stored server-side in Redis keyed by an opaque session id, replacing the signed-cookie session payload. This shrinks request headers, lets us revoke a single session instantly, and keeps sensitive session state off the client entirely.

title: Roadmap: multi-region read replicas for the catalog
body: Planned work to serve catalog reads from per-region Postgres read replicas so browse latency is low for customers far from the primary region. Writes still go to the primary; replica lag is surfaced to the app so stale reads can fall back. Not yet scheduled to a milestone.

title: Incident: duplicate payment charge on a retried request
body: A network timeout caused the client to retry a charge that had in fact succeeded, double-charging the customer. The fix makes the charge endpoint idempotent using a client-supplied idempotency key so a retried request returns the original result instead of charging again.

title: Deprecate the legacy XML export endpoint
body: The legacy XML export endpoint is deprecated in favor of the JSON export. It remains available for two release cycles with a deprecation header, after which it is removed. Consumers should migrate to the documented JSON schema and paginate with cursors.

title: Rewrite the storefront in an experimental framework
body: A proposal to rewrite the entire storefront in an unproven experimental framework. Rejected as not planned: the rewrite risk dwarfs the incremental benefit and would freeze feature delivery for two quarters.
